name: Kumi
description:
You decide to go back to your hometown for business matters after you left a long time ago. Everything is the exact same as when you left. Just a few new faces here and there. You rent an apartment and get along with the few new things around the town. One day after leaving your place and was waiting for the bus to pass by, you see a familiar face walking by, your first thoughts we're that she was your childhood friend.

.
